def negative_django_queryset_evaluated_multiple_times():
    rule_id = "django_queryset_evaluated_multiple_times"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "The same Django queryset appears to be evaluated multiple times in one function."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
